title: Decision #34 on the Creation of a National Committee for Land Planning and Urbanization of Area Surrounding Phnom Penh, Towns and Provinces in the Kingdom of Cambodia_931018
title_en: Decision #34 on the Creation of a National Committee for Land Planning and Urbanization of Area Surrounding Phnom Penh, Towns and Provinces in the Kingdom of Cambodia_931018
short_name: Decision #34 on the Creation of a National Committee for ...

provisions.content:
To create the “National Committee for Land Planning and Urbanization for Areas Surrounding Phnom
Penh, Towns and Provinces in the Kingdom of Cambodia”

The composition of the National Committee shall be as follows:

1. H.E. Vann Molivann Senior Minister Chairman

2. H.E. Kong Sam Ol Minister of Agriculture Member

3. H.E. Mok Maret Minister of Environment Member

4. H.E. Eng Roland Minister of Tourism Member

The tasks of the National Committee shall be as follows:

a). to protect the natural resources of the nation

b). to create policies aimed at encouraging people to take part in the economic, cultural and social

development in provinces and towns.

c) to study and prepare the master plans for all purposes public places in the provinces and towns.

d) to control the constructions of factories, hotels, restaurants, shops and houses, etc. so as to be in

harmony with the local landscape conditions.

e) to plan areas reserved for development in accordance with the master plans.

f) to maintain protected land areas surrounding rivers, lakes, and ponds for water and traffic usage.

g) to protect natural areas, forestry reserves and recreation parks

h) to determine areas for residential, commercial, cultural, and administrative constructions, areas for

slaughterhouses, facilities for utilities, transportations, and maintain clean environment particularly with

reference to air, water and noise pollution.

i) to protect from constructions and settlements land along public places, schools, sports fields, parks,

monasteries and infirmaries, railways and water channels, etc.

j) to cooperate with relevant ministries and institutions to prepare policies and draft laws pertaining

to planning of Phnom Penh or other cities and provinces, and to submit them to the Royal Government

to be adopted by the national Assembly.

k) to educate people to participate in the protection and the beautification of the environment and

landscapes of towns and countryside.

The “National Committee” shall have the right to establish an executive secretariat at the Cabinet of the
Prime Ministers to assist with its duties.

Each province and town shall have a sub-committee directly under the supervision of the Governor in

order to implement the directives as well as to report its activities to the National Committee as
specified in Article 2.

The National Committee shall have the right to cooperate with national institutions, international and

public organizations and the regional foundations to obtain financial support in order to implement the
above plans and objectives, and to determine its own budget.

The “National Committee” shall have the right to apply the seal of the Cabinet of the Council of
Ministers.
Any provision contrary to this decision shall be annulled.

The Co-ministers in charge of the Cabinet of the Council of Ministers, Ministers and Secretaries of State

in relevant ministries and institutions in provinces and towns, Excellencies and officials named in Article

1 shall implement this Sub-Decree from the date of its signatures.

The First Prime Minister The Second Prime

Minister

Royal Signature and Seal Signature and Seal

NORODOM RANARIDDH HUN SEN
